creator: andy@icc.surw.chel.su
text:
This is a port of simple 3D file manager for X Window System.
It allows you to navigate the directory tree using the mouse
and execute programs by clicking on them.


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	q3dmenu-1.0
#	q3dmenu-1.0/Makefile
#	q3dmenu-1.0/files
#	q3dmenu-1.0/files/md5
#	q3dmenu-1.0/pkg
#	q3dmenu-1.0/pkg/PLIST
#	q3dmenu-1.0/pkg/COMMENT
#	q3dmenu-1.0/pkg/DESCR
#	q3dmenu-1.0/patches
#	q3dmenu-1.0/patches/patch-aa
#
echo c - q3dmenu-1.0
mkdir -p q3dmenu-1.0 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - q3dmenu-1.0/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >q3dmenu-1.0/Makefile << 'END-of-q3dmenu-1.0/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	q3dmenu
X# Version required:			1.0
X# Date created:				1 May 1998
X# Whom:					Andrey Zakhvatov
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	q3dmenu
XPKGNAME=	q3dmenu-1.0
XCATEGORIES=	misc x11
XMASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.troll.no/contrib/
X
XMAINTAINER=	andy@icc.surw.chel.su
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	moc:${PORTSDIR}/x11/qt
XLIB_DEPENDS=	qt\\.1\\.:${PORTSDIR}/x11/qt \
X		MesaGL\\.13\\.:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/Mesa \
X		qgl\\.1\\.:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/qgl
X
XALL_TARGET=	q3dmenu
XUSE_X11=	yes
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/q3dmenu
X
Xdo-install:
X	@ ${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/q3dmenu ${PREFIX}/bin
X.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
X	@ ${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/q3dmenu
X	@ ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README ${PREFIX}/share/doc/q3dmenu
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-q3dmenu-1.0/Makefile
echo c - q3dmenu-1.0/files
mkdir -p q3dmenu-1.0/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - q3dmenu-1.0/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >q3dmenu-1.0/files/md5 << 'END-of-q3dmenu-1.0/files/md5'
XMD5 (q3dmenu.tar.gz) = 8a3f2dc3704f3306e16602ad263d5ce1
END-of-q3dmenu-1.0/files/md5
echo c - q3dmenu-1.0/pkg
mkdir -p q3dmenu-1.0/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - q3dmenu-1.0/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >q3dmenu-1.0/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-q3dmenu-1.0/pkg/PLIST'
Xbin/q3dmenu
Xshare/doc/q3dmenu/README
X@dirrm share/doc/q3dmenu/README
END-of-q3dmenu-1.0/pkg/PLIST
echo x - q3dmenu-1.0/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >q3dmenu-1.0/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-q3dmenu-1.0/pkg/COMMENT'
XSimple 3D file manager for X Window System.
END-of-q3dmenu-1.0/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - q3dmenu-1.0/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >q3dmenu-1.0/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-q3dmenu-1.0/pkg/DESCR'
XSimple 3D file manager which allows you to navigate the directory
Xtree using the mouse and execute programs by clicking on them.
END-of-q3dmenu-1.0/pkg/DESCR
echo c - q3dmenu-1.0/patches
mkdir -p q3dmenu-1.0/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - q3dmenu-1.0/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >q3dmenu-1.0/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-q3dmenu-1.0/patches/patch-aa'
X--- Makefile	Tue Aug 12 13:32:40 1997
X+++ /home/andy/tmp/wrk/Makefile	Fri May  1 15:40:09 1998
X@@ -2,11 +2,11 @@
X #######    /usr/local/qt-1.3beta1/Makefile for building on
X #######    linux-gcc-static on Thu Jul 17 18:26:16 EST 1997
X 
X-INCDIR = $(QTDIR)/include
X+INCDIR = /usr/X11R6/include/X11/qt
X CFLAGS = -fno-strength-reduce -W -I/usr/X11R6/include
X LIBCFLAGS = 
X YACCCFLAGS = -Wno-unused -Wno-parentheses
X-LFLAGS = -L$(QTDIR)/lib -lqt -L/usr/X11R6/lib -lX11
X+LFLAGS = -L$(QTDIR)/lib -lqt -L/usr/X11R6/lib -lX11 -lMesaGL -lm
X CC = gcc
X MOC = $(QTDIR)/bin/moc
X SHELL =	/bin/sh
END-of-q3dmenu-1.0/patches/patch-aa
exit

Fix: 

Please, check and commit this port.
